steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content:
The equation $|x-5|=10$ means $x-5$ is $10$ units from $0$. Because the question asks for one possible solution, it is enough to solve one valid case.
$$x-5=10$$

steps.title: Find one solution
steps.content: Solve the selected case. $$x=15$$ The answer is 15.
